recent_excerpts: Boost Security's SmokedMeat framework executes live attack demonstrations from a single CI/CD pipeline flaw, showing engineering teams exactly how attackers move to compromise code, secrets, and infra
Legit Security releases Legitify, an open-source scanner that identifies security misconfigurations in GitHub and GitLab organizations, repositories, and CI/CD runners to combat software supply chain
Objective Development releases a free Linux version of its macOS firewall, providing long-absent per-process network connection visibility for desktop privacy.
